name: I have a pre-existing back problem, can I still claim new work injury in Utah?
description: Yes if work aggravated it; need doctor linking to job.

mainEntity.name: I have a pre-existing back problem, can I still claim new work injury in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if work aggravated it; need doctor linking to job.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, if work aggravated it or caused new damage.**

Utah comp covers aggravations; prior conditions don't bar if job incident worsened symptoms.[4] Courts assess contribution.

- Medical opinion on aggravation needed.
- Disclose history honestly.
- Compare pre/post injury records.

Attorney helps prove industrial causation amid pre-existing debates.[1] Vital for back claims.
